title: Aureline portable workset alpha contract bundle
description: Index schema for the portable workset alpha lane. The canonical payloads remain split by responsibility: workset_artifact.schema.json owns durable workset, sparse-slice, scope-truth-chip, consumer-binding, and scope-widen-diff records; workset_switcher.schema.json owns switcher rows and scope banners; scope_diff_review.schema.json owns explicit widening review sheets; cross_repo_result_group.schema.json and cross_repo_jump_event.schema.json preserve cross-repo identity and outside-current-scope markers. This bundle exists so automation, docs, and support/export review can cite one alpha family without inventing a private scope schema.
